{

/// @generated
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Conditional
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>


class MyData final {

    static constexpr char GetFirstChar(std::string_view str) { return str[0]; }
    static constexpr char GetLastChar(std::string_view str) { return str[str.length() - 1]; }
    static constexpr int32_t GetLength(std::string_view str) { return static_cast<int32_t>(str.length()); }

public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const std::string_view key) noexcept {
        int32_t getLength;
        char getLastChar;
        char getFirstChar;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength > 5))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getLastChar = GetLastChar(key);
        if ((getLastChar > 50))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getFirstChar = GetFirstChar(key);
        if ((getFirstChar > 116))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((getFirstChar < 116))
        {
         return false;
        }


        if (key == u8"test1" || key == u8"test2")
            return true;

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 2;
    static constexpr int32_t min_key_length = 5;
    static constexpr int32_t max_key_length = 5;
    static constexpr bool has_number = true;
    static constexpr bool has_uppercase = false;
    static constexpr bool has_lowercase = true;
    static constexpr bool has_symbol = false;
    static constexpr bool has_whitespace = false;
};
,
  Item2: 
}
